The '''[[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of [[Galidraan/Legends|Galidraan]]''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was appointed to the position by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]].

==Biography==
[[File:Galidraan_Protocol_Droid_1.jpg|thumb|left|150px|The governor running]]
That year, he hired the [[True Mandalorians]] to deal with political protesters to his rule; at the same time, under the advice of the [[Death Watch/Legends|Death Watch]], he told the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] that the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] were butchering civilians. A [[Jedi task force]] under [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] [[Battle of Galidraan|eradicated]] the True Mandalorians; the Governor took the armor of the survivor, [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], and sold him into slavery.

Two years later, Fett returned to reclaim his armor, forcing the Governor to tell him the whereabouts of [[Tor Vizsla]], the Death Watch leader.
